content.problemStatement: Write a program for the coding challenge "Playoff Tournament". Refer to LeetCode description: https://codeforces.com/contest/1535/problem/D?locale=en
content.inputFormat: The first line contains an integer n, the number of teams. The second line contains n integers, the ratings of the teams.
content.outputFormat: The output should be the minimum number of matches required to determine the winner.

solution.approach: The approach to solve this problem is to use the properties of a binary tree. In a binary tree, the number of matches required to determine the winner is equal to the number of nodes minus one.
